gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/361)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/361)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) احْمِلْ نَفْسَكَ لِنَفْسِكَ فَإِنْ لَمْ تَفْعَلْ لَمْ يَحْمِلْكَ غَيْرُكَ .

en.hubeali: From him, from one of our companions, raising it, said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Carry yourself (your burden) by yourself, for it you do not do so, others will not carry you’.
en.sarwar: 5. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from certain individuals of our people in a marfu’ manner who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Hold your soul responsible for yourself. If you did not do so others will not do for you.’”
